raw_consumer_statement: I ordered a jump starter off of XXXX  XXXX  and it took over 2 weeks to shows delivered and i contacted XXXX  XXXX  multiple times for item showing delivered when it was missing and they agreed to a refund because i never received it and now their lying to the credit card company saying 'Goods delivered ' 'item not returned ' 'seller didnt reach out for refund ' 'customer didnt follow return/refund policy ' all of this is a lie from XXXX XXXX i did all the right stuff they told me to they even told me that the item was lost in transit even provided me a refund ticket
